categories.name: أَلْفَاظٌ مِنْ سُورَتَيِ الْمَاعُونِ وَالْكَوْثَرِ
categories.nameEn: Words from Surah Al-Ma'un and Al-Kawthar

items.verseEn: [But] who are heedless of their prayer -
So pray to your Lord and offer sacrifice [to Him alone].
Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off.

categories.name: أَفْعَالٌ وَأَسْمَاءٌ لِوَصْفِ خَلْقِ السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ مِنْ سُورَةِ النَّازِعَاتِ
categories.nameEn: Verbs and nouns from Surah An-Nazi'at describing the creation of the sky and earth

items.verseEn: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it.
And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness.
He extracted from it its water and its pasture,
And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth's surface.

categories.name: كَلِمَاتٌ مِنْ سُورَةِ الْوَاقِعَةِ تَصِفُ حَالَ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ
categories.nameEn: Words from Surah Al-Waqi'ah describing the blissful state of the inhabitants of Paradise

items.verseEn: Reclining on them, facing each other.
No headache will they have therefrom, nor will they be intoxicated -
And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.

categories.name: أَسْمَاءٌ لِيَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ مُضَافَةٌ إِلَى كَلِمَةِ 'يَوْم'
categories.nameEn: Names for the Day of Judgment that form a possessive construction (iḍāfah) with the word 'yawm' (day)

items.verse: يَوْمَ يَجْمَعُكُمْ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْجَمْعِ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلتَّغَابُنِ ۗ وَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَـٰلِحًۭا يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِۦ وَيُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّـٰتٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
items.verseEn: The Day He will assemble you for the Day of Assembly - that is the Day of Deprivation. And whoever believes in Allāh and does righteousness - He will remove from him his misdeeds and admit him to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever. That is the great attainment.

items.verse: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
items.verseEn: [They will be told], "This is the Day of Judgement which you used to deny."
Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity."

items.verse: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ وَٱلْإِيمَـٰنَ لَقَدْ لَبِثْتُمْ فِى كِتَـٰبِ ٱللَّهِ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْبَعْثِ ۖ فَهَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْبَعْثِ وَلَـٰكِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
items.verseEn: But those who were given knowledge and faith will say, "You remained the extent of Allāh's decree until the Day of Resurrection, and this is the Day of Resurrection, but you did not used to know."

harf.hint: A divine gift, grace, or bounty.
harf.arabicVerse: قَالَ ٱلَّذِى عِندَهُۥ عِلْمٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن يَرْتَدَّ إِلَيْكَ طَرْفُكَ ۚ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهُ مُسْتَقِرًّا عِندَهُۥ قَالَ هَـٰذَا مِن فَضْلِ رَبِّى لِيَبْلُوَنِىٓ ءَأَشْكُرُ أَمْ أَكْفُرُ ۖ وَمَن شَكَرَ فَإِنَّمَا يَشْكُرُ لِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن كَفَرَ فَإِنَّ رَبِّى غَنِىٌّۭ كَرِيمٌۭ
harf.verse: 27:40 — Said one who had knowledge from the Scripture, "I will bring it to you before your glance returns to you." And when [Solomon] saw it placed before him, he said, "This is from the favor of my Lord to test me whether I will be grateful or ungrateful. And whoever is grateful - his gratitude is only for [the benefit of] himself. And whoever is ungrateful - then indeed, my Lord is Free of need and Generous."

deduction.title: The Message Amidst the Mockery
deduction.intro: For centuries, a devoted servant of Allah delivered a message of warning to a stubborn and arrogant people. Despite tireless efforts and patient pleas, their hearts remained sealed in disbelief. This individual's unwavering faith would ultimately lead to a world-altering event, a testament to divine justice and mercy for the few who heeded the call. Can you uncover the identity of this steadfast messenger?
clues: I called to my people night and day, but my call only increased their flight from the truth.
They would put their fingers in their ears and cover themselves with their garments, persisting in their arrogance.
I lived among them for a lifetime, a total of 950 years, yet most did not believe.
I pleaded with my Lord for my own child, who refused to join me, but was told they were not of my family due to their unrighteous actions.
Under Allah's watchful eyes and inspiration, I constructed a great vessel, a means of salvation from a coming deluge.
The floodwaters engulfed the entire earth, and only those who boarded the Ark with me, along with a pair of every creature, were saved.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Hud
Prophet Salih
Prophet Nuh
Prophet Shu'ayb
Prophet Lut

trial.label: What Was My Great Trial?
options: Being cast into a fire by a tyrannical king
Calling my people to Tawhid for 950 years and the Great Flood
Facing the magicians of a powerful Pharaoh
A test involving the sacrifice of my son
Being swallowed by a giant fish
trial.answer: Calling my people to Tawhid for 950 years and the Great Flood

location.label: What Was the Key Element of Salvation?
options: A staff that turned into a serpent
A she-camel that emerged from a rock
A coat that inspired a ruler's dream
The Ark (Al-Fulk)
A flock of birds carrying baked clay stones

outcome.label: What Was the Ultimate Outcome?
options: My people were destroyed by a violent, roaring wind
My family was saved, but my wife turned back and was destroyed with the wicked cities
My entire nation accepted faith, and their punishment was averted
The disbelievers, including my son and wife, were drowned, and a new civilization began with the believers.
I was raised to the heavens, and my people were left in dispute
outcome.answer: The disbelievers, including my son and wife, were drowned, and a new civilization began with the believers.

deduction.arabic: وَقَالَ نُوحٌۭ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
deduction.verse: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant. (71:26)

scramble.hint: This verse states the ultimate purpose behind the creation of both jinn and humankind.
scramble.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
scramble.verseEn: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.
